interface.longDescription:
The HeyGen app lets you create professional avatar videos directly from ChatGPT. Start with a prompt, script, or conversation. HeyGen turns it into a finished talking-head video using AI avatars, voices, and visual scenes.  It's built for content creators, educators, and professionals who communicate through video. Explain ideas, teach lessons, or share updates without recording yourself.

Whether you're refining an idea or starting from scratch, HeyGen helps you move from text to video in minutes.
defaultPrompt: A video explaining the rules of golf
